description_long: This is a round wooden table with a thick, rustic slab top that features a large clock face design inlaid on its surface, complete with Roman numerals and concentric wood grain rings. The tabletop has a natural, uneven edge, giving it a handcrafted, organic appearance. The table is supported by three robust, irregularly shaped legs that resemble sections of tree trunks, adding to its rugged, natural aesthetic. The clock face is visually striking, with white numerals and markings contrasting against the warm, brown wood tones. Subtle cracks and textural details are visible on the legs, enhancing the impression of solid, heavy timber construction. This table would serve as a unique centerpiece in an urban park, plaza, or themed outdoor seating area.
description: A round, rustic wooden table with a thick slab top featuring a large clock face inlay and three sturdy, tree trunk-like legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the clock face tabletop and two of the three thick, textured legs, with the natural wood edge clearly visible.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the clock face design and the arrangement of the three uneven, trunk-like legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back two legs and the rough, bark-like texture of the wood, with the clock face still prominent.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the side profile of the tabletop and the organic, irregular shape of the supporting legs.
